vocab.meaning: những khung cảnh đẹp đến nghẹt thở
vocab.example: I am particularly drawn to hiking because it allows me to capture breathtaking vistas from the mountain peaks.

vocab.meaning: giờ vàng (thời điểm ngay sau khi mặt trời mọc hoặc trước khi mặt trời lặn)
vocab.example: I always try to head out during the golden hour to get that soft, warm glow in my landscape shots.
To me, scenery photography is a form of visual storytelling that conveys the raw power of nature.
The hotel balcony offered a stunning panoramic view of the coastline, which I just had to photograph.

vocab.meaning: thiên nhiên hoang sơ (chưa bị con người tác động)
vocab.example: I have a soft spot for capturing unspoilt nature, far away from the concrete jungle of the city.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thẩm mỹ, sự lôi cuốn về nghệ thuật
vocab.example: The aesthetic appeal of a mist-covered lake in the morning is truly unparalleled for any photographer.

vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc thị giác (thứ gì đó rất đẹp để ngắm nhìn)
vocab.example: The autumn foliage in Japan is a total feast for the eyes and a perfect subject for my camera.
I love how a high-quality lens can pick up the vibrant hues of a sunset over the horizon.
Great landscape photos should evoke a sense of tranquility and peace in the viewer.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen/vũ điệu của ánh sáng
vocab.example: The subtle play of light and shadow on the rolling hills creates a very dramatic effect in photographs.
